title: esquizo.com v7
body: [![](http://farm3.static.flickr.com/2375/1831714481_94ac381ff1_m.jpg)](http://www.esquizo.com "esquizo.com")The latest changes I made to [esquizo.com](http://www.esquizo.com "esquizo.com") have caused nothing but complications: it was a mistake to switch to [*Joomla*](http://www.xarop.com/category/diseno-web/cms/joomla/ "other posts discussing this CMS") (it’s a technologically outdated [CMS](http://www.xarop.com/category/diseno-web/cms/ "Content Management System")), and it was a mistake to migrate the *hosting* to the US, [*hostony*](http://www.xarop.com/?s=hostony "Other posts discussing this hosting") may work very well there, but here it is slow and causes me [SEO](http://www.xarop.com/category/diseno-web/seo-posicionamiento/) issues. While I look for a solution, I’ve migrated all the content to [*WordPress*](http://www.xarop.com/category/diseno-web/cms/wordpress/ "other posts discussing this CMS") and kept the forums on [*Joomla*](http://www.xarop.com/category/web-design/cms/joomla/ "other posts about this CMS") installed the WP Forum plugin for the forums and created some [new forums](http://www.esquizo.com/foros/ "Mental Health Forums") with [Vanilla](http://getvanilla.com/). When I have some time, I want to start from scratch and create a more permanent *site*, most likely with [*Drupal*.](http://www.xarop.com/?s=drupal "Other posts discussing this CMS")
